---
title: "Why We Built The SelfHealth App: Moving From Data to Direction"
date: "2026-05-25"
featured_image: ""
pillar: "train"
slug: "why-we-built-selfhealth-app"
---


<p >We have access to an incredible amount of health data today. Between smartwatches tracking sleep stages, rings measuring heart rate variability (HRV), and detailed blood panels coming in every few months, we have more numbers on our bodies than ever before.</p>

<p >But having data isn't the same thing as having a plan.</p>

<p >For a long time, the morning routine looked something like this: wake up, open three different apps to check sleep scores, recovery metrics, and training logs, and try to piece it all together. Eventually, it turned into copying all those metrics and dropping them into an AI prompt just to get an answer to a basic question:</p>

<p ><em>“I slept six hours, my deep sleep was low, my HRV is down, and I did heavy legs two days ago. I want to build muscle and drop body fat. What should I actually do in the gym today?”</em></p>

<p >The AI could give great advice, but the workflow was ridiculous. No one should have to manually route their private biological data through a chat box just to figure out their daily workout.</p>

<p >We are drowning in data, but we are completely lacking direction, it really doesn't need to be so complicated.</p>

<p >That is why we built the <a href="http://www.selfhealthliving.com/app" data-type="link" data-id="http://www.selfhealthliving.com/app">SelfHealth App</a>. We didn’t want to build another passive dashboard full of graphs you have to decode. We wanted a central, intelligent tool that answers the only question that matters when you wake up: <em>What is the best course of action for my body today?</em></p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Why This Matters As We Age</h2>

<p >The math on fitness changes as you get older. In your 20s, your body is incredibly forgiving. You can out train a terrible night of sleep, eat whatever you want, and still make progress?</p>

<p >Once you cross into your 40s, that margin for error drops to zero, you don't have the energy or time with so many other priorities pulling you in every which way.</p>

<p >If your goal is true body recomposition and building lean muscle while losing body fat it seems it a unforeseeable science project that only others can achieve. If you push at 100% when your recovery is totally tanked, your cortisol spikes, your hormones take a hit, and your body actively holds onto fat while burning away muscle.</p>

<p >To get results, you need a holistic approach. Your daily training volume, your sleep architecture, and your deep internal blood biomarkers have to talk to each other.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">A Scientifically Backed, Holistic Approach</h2>

<p >We built SelfHealth around data and scientifically backed metrics, not fitness fads or generic influencer routines. We focused on the markers that actually drive longevity and performance:</p>

<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li ><strong>Sleep Architecture:</strong> Deep sleep trends, REM cycles, and resting heart rate.</li>

<li ><strong>Fitness Stimulus:</strong> Training volume, tracking progressive overload, and workout history.</li>

<li ><strong>Vitals &amp; Bloodwork:</strong> The deep baseline markers that show your true metabolic health.</li>
</ul>

<p >Instead of leaving you to figure out how these pieces connect, we engineered our own <strong>Vitals Score algorithm</strong>.</p>

<p ><img class="wp-image-769" style="width: 150px;" src="/images/uploads/Simulator-Screenshot-iPhone-17-Pro-Max-2026-05-13-at-21.47.46-scaled.png" alt=""> <img class="wp-image-782" style="width: 150px;" src="/images/uploads/Simulator-Screenshot-iPhone-17-Pro-Max-2026-05-13-at-22.14.27-scaled.png" alt=""> <img class="wp-image-786" style="width: 150px;" src="/images/uploads/Simulator-Screenshot-iPhone-17-Pro-Max-2026-05-13-at-21.07.49-1-scaled.png" alt=""></p>

<p >The Vitals Score looks at these fragmented pieces through an evidence-based lens and gives you a clear direction. It tells you exactly when to push for a new personal record, when to stick to zone 2 cardio, and when your body genuinely needs active recovery to grow muscle. It turns raw numbers into a daily plan.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Keeping Your Intimate Data Secure</h2>

<p >From day one, we had a strict rule about privacy.</p>

<p >Your health data, especially your bloodwork is the most intimate information you own. Yet, almost every fitness app on the market forces you to upload your entire biological history to a cloud server, where it’s stored, analyzed, and often monetized. We at Selfhealth Living understand the benefits to that, but also understand it is something not everyone will willing to commit to. There are just too many unknowns that prevent us from trusting a company with such personal data.</p>

<p >We refuse to make that trade off. You shouldn't have to sacrifice your privacy to optimize your health.</p>

<p >To make this work, we deliberately leveraged Apple's ecosystem to keep everything local. If you’ve ever looked into it, Apple is incredibly restrictive about how health data is shared with third party companies. Instead of fighting that restriction, we embraced it as a core feature. We designed the app so that your data never has to leave your device.</p>

<p >Everything is encrypted and stored right where it belongs: locally on your phone. The calculations, the insights, and the biometric tracking happen entirely in the palm of your hand. You get cutting edge health analysis within a completely closed, secure loop.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Moving From Guesswork to Execution</h2>

<p >We didn't build this app to launch a flashy fitness brand. We built it because we needed a tool that treated our bodies like unique systems, respected personal privacy, and removed the daily friction of managing health longevity.</p>

<p >The philosophy behind the app is straightforward: <strong>Measure what matters, secure your data, and automate the wisdom.</strong></p>

<p >We are incredibly excited to finally share it with you. No more hopping between apps, no more manual copying and pasting, and no more guessing. Just execution.</p>

<p ><em>Stay tuned as we roll out updates! Be sure to bookmark the site and check back next week for more deep dives into data-driven longevity.</em></p>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Self Health Living – Story Ad</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html,body{width:100%;min-height:100vh;background:#060606;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
.scaler{width:100%;max-width:420px;}
.phone{width:375px;height:812px;transform-origin:top left;position:relative;border-radius:50px;border:8px solid #1c1c1c;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px #2a2a2a,0 50px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.9);overflow:hidden;background:#000;}
.stage{width:100%;height:100%;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}

/* Progress */
.prog{position:absolute;top:14px;left:12px;right:12px;display:flex;gap:4px;z-index:100;}
.seg{flex:1;height:3px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);overflow:hidden;}
.seg-fill{height:100%;width:0%;background:#fff;border-radius:2px;}
.seg.done .seg-fill{width:100%;}
.seg.active .seg-fill{animation:segF var(--dur,4.5s) linear forwards;}
@keyframes segF{to{width:100%;}}

/* Ambient bg */
.sh-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;transition:background 0.9s ease;}
.sh-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.022) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.022) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:32px 32px;}
.sh-o1,.sh-o2{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(75px);z-index:0;animation:oP 8s ease-in-out infinite;transition:background 1s ease;}
.sh-o1{width:240px;height:240px;top:-70px;right:-60px;}
.sh-o2{width:190px;height:190px;bottom:50px;left:-60px;animation-delay:4s;}
@keyframes oP{0%,100%{opacity:.5;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.1)}}

/* Dots */
.dots{position:absolute;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:5px;z-index:100;}
.dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);transition:width .3s,background .3s;}
.dot.active{width:16px;}

/* Screen base */
.screen{
  position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  padding:40px 20px 26px;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transform:translateX(36px) scale(.97);
  transition:opacity .5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),transform .5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.screen.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;transform:translateX(0) scale(1);}
.screen.exiting{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-36px) scale(.97);}

/* Shared header */
.s-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;flex-shrink:0;}
.s-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.s-logo{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5);}
.s-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.s-name{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.3;}
.s-pill{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;border:1px solid;}

/* Phone mockup */
.pm-wrap{
  position:relative;width:200px;
  margin:0 auto 14px;flex-shrink:0;
  animation:pmFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes pmFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-9px)}}
.pm-shell{
  width:100%;border-radius:30px;
  border:5px solid #1a1a1a;
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px #282828,0 0 0 1px #0d0d0d,
    0 22px 52px rgba(0,0,0,.75),
    0 0 50px var(--glow,rgba(167,139,250,.14));
  overflow:hidden;background:#000;position:relative;
}
.pm-notch{position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:62px;height:14px;background:#000;border-radius:0 0 10px 10px;z-index:10;}
.pm-img{width:100%;display:block;}
.pm-fade{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:55px;z-index:5;}

/* Body text */
.s-body{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;}
.s-eye{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;}
.s-title{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.05;color:#fff;margin-bottom:7px;}
.s-title em{font-style:italic;}
.s-sub{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.44);line-height:1.58;margin-bottom:12px;}

/* Stat chips */
.stats{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.stat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);border-radius:10px;padding:6px 10px;animation:stIn .4s ease both;}
.stat:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.08s;}
.stat:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s;}
.stat:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.32s;}
@keyframes stIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(7px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.stat-v{font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;display:block;line-height:1.1;}
.stat-l{font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;}

/* CTA */
.s-cta{width:100%;padding:13px;border:none;border-radius:14px;color:#fff;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:5px;flex-shrink:0;}
.s-cta::after{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:55%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.2),transparent);animation:sh 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes sh{0%{left:-100%}100%{left:200%}}
.s-sub2{text-align:center;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.22);letter-spacing:.04em;flex-shrink:0;}

/* ── Screen 6: Final CTA ── */
.s6-body{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;}
.s6-logo{width:78px;height:78px;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;margin:0 auto 14px;box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(124,58,237,.42);opacity:0;transform:scale(.7);transition:opacity .5s .12s ease,transform .5s .12s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);}
.screen.active .s6-logo{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}
.s6-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.s6-h{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;line-height:1.05;color:#fff;margin-bottom:9px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px);transition:opacity .5s .3s ease,transform .5s .3s ease;}
.screen.active .s6-h{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.s6-h em{font-style:italic;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#a78bfa,#ec4899);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
.s6-sub{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.6;max-width:260px;margin:0 auto 18px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);transition:opacity .5s .46s ease,transform .5s .46s ease;}
.screen.active .s6-sub{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.s6-feats{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;width:100%;margin-bottom:16px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);transition:opacity .5s .6s ease,transform .5s .6s ease;}
.screen.active .s6-feats{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.s6-feat{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 11px;}
.s6-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.s6-txt{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-weight:500;}
.s6-cta{width:100%;opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);transition:opacity .5s .76s ease,transform .5s .76s ease;flex-shrink:0;}
.screen.active .s6-cta{opacity:1;transform:none;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="scaler" id="scaler">
<div class="phone" id="phone">
<div class="stage" id="stage">

  <div class="sh-bg" id="shBg"></div>
  <div class="sh-grid"></div>
  <div class="sh-o1" id="o1"></div>
  <div class="sh-o2" id="o2"></div>

  <!-- Progress: 6 segments -->
  <div class="prog">
    <div class="seg" id="seg0"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="seg" id="seg1"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="seg" id="seg2"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="seg" id="seg3"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="seg" id="seg4"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="seg" id="seg5"><div class="seg-fill"></div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S1: Dashboard / Aliya ══ -->
  <div class="screen active" id="screen0">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(124,58,237,.14);border-color:rgba(167,139,250,.3);color:#a78bfa;">✦ AI Coach</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pm-wrap" style="--glow:rgba(167,139,250,.18)">
      <div class="pm-shell">
        <div class="pm-notch"></div>
        <img class="pm-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="dashboard">
        <div class="pm-fade" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,#06040e 0%,transparent 100%);"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s-body">
      <div class="s-eye" style="color:#a78bfa;">Meet Aliya · Your AI Coach</div>
      <div class="s-title">Your coach<br><em style="color:#a78bfa;">that never sleeps.</em></div>
      <p class="s-sub">Aliya reads your vitals, sleep & labs — then builds your daily protocol automatically.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#a78bfa;">15</span><span class="stat-l">Vitals</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#63b3ed;">94</span><span class="stat-l">Sleep</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#fb923c;">Recovery</span><span class="stat-l">Mode Active</span></div>
      </div>
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#6366f1);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(124,58,237,.38);">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2">Free · Premium upgrades available</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S2: Bloodwork ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen1">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(248,113,113,.13);border-color:rgba(248,113,113,.3);color:#fca5a5;">🧪 Bloodwork</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pm-wrap" style="--glow:rgba(248,113,113,.16)">
      <div class="pm-shell">
        <div class="pm-notch"></div>
        <img class="pm-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="bloodwork">
        <div class="pm-fade" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,#140608 0%,transparent 100%);"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s-body">
      <div class="s-eye" style="color:#fca5a5;">Blood Markers</div>
      <div class="s-title">Your labs,<br><em style="color:#f87171;">decoded.</em></div>
      <p class="s-sub">Import 200+ markers. Track cholesterol, HbA1c, HDL, LDL and more — all in one place.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#68d391;">185</span><span class="stat-l">Total Chol</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#68d391;">76</span><span class="stat-l">HDL mg/dL</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#fbbf24;">5.7%</span><span class="stat-l">HbA1c</span></div>
      </div>
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#f97316);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(239,68,68,.32);">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2">OCR import · Quest · LabCorp · Any PDF</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S3: Fitness ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen2">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(251,146,60,.13);border-color:rgba(251,146,60,.3);color:#fdba74;">🏋️ Fitness</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pm-wrap" style="--glow:rgba(251,146,60,.18)">
      <div class="pm-shell">
        <div class="pm-notch"></div>
        <img class="pm-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="fitness">
        <div class="pm-fade" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,#100800 0%,transparent 100%);"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s-body">
      <div class="s-eye" style="color:#fdba74;">Training & Workouts</div>
      <div class="s-title">Train smarter,<br><em style="color:#fb923c;">not harder.</em></div>
      <p class="s-sub">Log workouts, track training load zones, and let Aliya build your personalised plan.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#fb923c;">72</span><span class="stat-l">Fit Score</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#68d391;">78 min</span><span class="stat-l">Exercise</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#a78bfa;">Optimal</span><span class="stat-l">Load Status</span></div>
      </div>
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f97316,#eab308);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(249,115,22,.32);">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2">Zone 2 · Zone 3 · Strength · Templates</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S4: Cycle ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen3">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(236,72,153,.13);border-color:rgba(236,72,153,.3);color:#f9a8d4;">🌸 Cycle</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pm-wrap" style="--glow:rgba(236,72,153,.18)">
      <div class="pm-shell">
        <div class="pm-notch"></div>
        <img class="pm-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="cycle">
        <div class="pm-fade" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,#140612 0%,transparent 100%);"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s-body">
      <div class="s-eye" style="color:#f9a8d4;">Cycle Tracking</div>
      <div class="s-title">Know your<br><em style="color:#ec4899;">phase. Own it.</em></div>
      <p class="s-sub">Menstrual, follicular, ovulation, luteal — every phase comes with energy & focus coaching.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#f9a8d4;">Menstrual</span><span class="stat-l">Current Phase</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#c4b5fd;">Day 1</span><span class="stat-l">Cycle Day</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#86efac;">Low</span><span class="stat-l">Energy Mode</span></div>
      </div>
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ec4899,#a78bfa);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(236,72,153,.32);">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2">Syncs with Apple Health · Oura Ring</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S5: Calm ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen4">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(52,211,153,.12);border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.28);color:#6ee7b7;">🍃 Calm</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pm-wrap" style="--glow:rgba(52,211,153,.16)">
      <div class="pm-shell">
        <div class="pm-notch"></div>
        <img class="pm-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="calm">
        <div class="pm-fade" style="background:linear-gradient(to top,#030e09 0%,transparent 100%);"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s-body">
      <div class="s-eye" style="color:#6ee7b7;">Nervous System & Calm</div>
      <div class="s-title">Feel what your<br><em style="color:#34d399;">body is saying.</em></div>
      <p class="s-sub">Nervous system load score, mood & energy check-ins, and mindfulness — all in one view.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#fb923c;">70</span><span class="stat-l">Load Score</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#6ee7b7;">Calm</span><span class="stat-l">Today's Mood</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-v" style="color:#93c5fd;">75%</span><span class="stat-l">Consistency</span></div>
      </div>
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#3b82f6);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(16,185,129,.3);">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2">HRV · RHR · Wrist temp · Mindfulness</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ S6: Final CTA ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen5">
    <div class="s-hdr">
      <div class="s-brand">
        <div class="s-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
        <div class="s-name">Self Health<br>Living</div>
      </div>
      <div class="s-pill" style="background:rgba(124,58,237,.14);border-color:rgba(167,139,250,.3);color:#a78bfa;">Free Download</div>
    </div>
    <div class="s6-body">
      <div class="s6-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="logo"></div>
      <div class="s6-h">Everything you<br>need to <em>know yourself.</em></div>
      <p class="s6-sub">The only app connecting blood, cycle, nervous system, fitness, sleep & AI coaching.</p>
      <div class="s6-feats">
        <div class="s6-feat"><div class="s6-dot" style="background:#a78bfa;"></div><span class="s6-txt">✦ Aliya AI — daily personalised protocol</span></div>
        <div class="s6-feat"><div class="s6-dot" style="background:#f87171;"></div><span class="s6-txt">🧪 200+ blood markers — OCR lab import</span></div>
        <div class="s6-feat"><div class="s6-dot" style="background:#fb923c;"></div><span class="s6-txt">🏋️ Fitness tracking — load zones & workouts</span></div>
        <div class="s6-feat"><div class="s6-dot" style="background:#ec4899;"></div><span class="s6-txt">🌸 Cycle phases — energy & focus coaching</span></div>
        <div class="s6-feat"><div class="s6-dot" style="background:#34d399;"></div><span class="s6-txt">🍃 Nervous system load — mood & HRV</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="s6-cta">
      <button class="s-cta" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#ec4899);box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(124,58,237,.4);padding:15px;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="13" height="13"><path d="M18.71 19.5c-.83 1.24-1.71 2.45-3.05 2.47-1.34.03-1.77-.79-3.29-.79-1.53 0-2 .77-3.27.82-1.31.05-2.3-1.32-3.14-2.53C4.25 17 2.94 12.45 4.7 9.39c.87-1.52 2.43-2.48 4.12-2.51 1.28-.02 2.5.87 3.29.87.78 0 2.26-1.07 3.8-.91.65.03 2.47.26 3.64 1.98-.09.06-2.17 1.28-2.15 3.81.03 3.02 2.65 4.03 2.68 4.04-.03.07-.42 1.44-1.38 2.83M13 3.5c.73-.83 1.94-1.46 2.94-1.5.13 1.17-.34 2.35-1.04 3.19-.69.85-1.83 1.51-2.95 1.42-.15-1.15.41-2.35 1.05-3.11z"/></svg>
        Download Free on App Store
      </button>
      <div class="s-sub2" style="margin-top:5px;">Free to start · <span style="color:rgba(167,139,250,.65);">selfhealthliving.com</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Dots -->
  <div class="dots">
    <div class="dot active" id="dot0"></div>
    <div class="dot" id="dot1"></div>
    <div class="dot" id="dot2"></div>
    <div class="dot" id="dot3"></div>
    <div class="dot" id="dot4"></div>
    <div class="dot" id="dot5"></div>
  </div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
const DURS=[5200,4800,4800,4800,4800,5500];
const N=6;
let cur=0,tmr=null;

const screens=Array.from({length:N},(_,i)=>document.getElementById("screen"+i));
const dots=Array.from({length:N},(_,i)=>document.getElementById("dot"+i));
const segs=Array.from({length:N},(_,i)=>document.getElementById("seg"+i));
const o1=document.getElementById("o1"),o2=document.getElementById("o2");
const shBg=document.getElementById("shBg");

const T=[
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(124,58,237,.18) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(99,102,241,.11) 0%,transparent 55%),#060410",c1:"rgba(124,58,237,.18)",c2:"rgba(99,102,241,.11)",dot:"#a78bfa"},
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(239,68,68,.15) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(249,115,22,.1) 0%,transparent 55%),#140608",c1:"rgba(239,68,68,.15)",c2:"rgba(249,115,22,.1)",dot:"#fca5a5"},
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(251,146,60,.15) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(234,179,8,.1) 0%,transparent 55%),#100800",c1:"rgba(251,146,60,.15)",c2:"rgba(234,179,8,.1)",dot:"#fdba74"},
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(236,72,153,.15) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(167,139,250,.11) 0%,transparent 55%),#140612",c1:"rgba(236,72,153,.15)",c2:"rgba(167,139,250,.11)",dot:"#f9a8d4"},
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(52,211,153,.14) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(59,130,246,.1) 0%,transparent 55%),#030e09",c1:"rgba(52,211,153,.14)",c2:"rgba(59,130,246,.1)",dot:"#6ee7b7"},
  {bg:"radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 55% at 15% 5%,rgba(124,58,237,.18) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 85% 90%,rgba(236,72,153,.12) 0%,transparent 55%),#06040e",c1:"rgba(124,58,237,.18)",c2:"rgba(236,72,153,.12)",dot:"#a78bfa"},
];

function goTo(i){
  screens[cur].classList.remove("active");
  screens[cur].classList.add("exiting");
  segs[cur].classList.remove("active");
  segs[cur].classList.add("done");
  dots[cur].classList.remove("active");
  const old=cur;
  setTimeout(()=>screens[old]&&screens[old].classList.remove("exiting"),560);
  cur=i;
  screens[cur].classList.add("active");
  dots[cur].classList.add("active");
  dots[cur].style.background=T[cur].dot;
  for(let j=0;j<cur;j++){segs[j].classList.add("done");segs[j].classList.remove("active");}
  for(let j=cur+1;j<N;j++){segs[j].classList.remove("done","active");segs[j].querySelector(".seg-fill").style.width="0%";}
  segs[cur].classList.remove("done");
  segs[cur].classList.add("active");
  segs[cur].style.setProperty("--dur",(DURS[cur]/1000)+"s");
  const fill=segs[cur].querySelector(".seg-fill");
  fill.style.animation="none";fill.offsetHeight;fill.style.animation="";
  shBg.style.background=T[cur].bg;
  o1.style.background=T[cur].c1;
  o2.style.background=T[cur].c2;
  clearTimeout(tmr);
  tmr=setTimeout(()=>goTo((cur+1)%N),DURS[cur]);
}

document.getElementById("stage").addEventListener("click",e=>{
  const x=e.clientX,w=e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect().width;
  goTo(x>w*.3?(cur+1)%N:(cur-1+N)%N);
});

// init
shBg.style.background=T[0].bg;
o1.style.background=T[0].c1;
o2.style.background=T[0].c2;
dots[0].style.background=T[0].dot;
segs[0].classList.add("active");
segs[0].style.setProperty("--dur",(DURS[0]/1000)+"s");
tmr=setTimeout(()=>goTo(1),DURS[0]);
</script>

<script>
function scaleAd(){
  const s=document.getElementById("scaler");
  const p=document.getElementById("phone");
  const sc=s.clientWidth/375;
  p.style.transform="scale("+sc+")";
  p.style.transformOrigin="top left";
  s.style.height=(812*sc)+"px";
}
scaleAd();
window.addEventListener("resize",scaleAd);
</script>
</body>
</html>
